message:
feat: add AWS Bedrock as LLM provider

Add support for AWS Bedrock, enabling users to access Claude and other
models through their existing AWS infrastructure. Supports multiple
auth methods: explicit credentials (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID/SECRET), shared
credentials file (AWS_PROFILE), and IAM roles (web identity tokens).

- Add "bedrock" to LLMProviderEnum
- Add @ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock dependency
- Support AWS credential chain in getModel() and isLLMAvailable()
- Default fallback model: anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-20250514-v1:0

Closes #13

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
